content.en:
"Lord Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, it's approaching!"

Yao Yu said in a hurry.

His heir was captured, and he naturally wanted to rescue the other party as soon as possible, so he seemed very urgent.

However, Ye Tian's speed slowed down.

Because if he is too fast, it is easy to attract the attention of the other party, and if his whereabouts are exposed, it will not be good.

"Something is wrong, there is danger!"

Ye Tian snorted suddenly.

At this moment, three terrifying auras emerged, locking him from three directions.

Immediately, Ye Tian put Yao Yu away.

I saw three attacks coming, and it was a three-door Dao attack.

However, the other party's Taoist attainments are not high, and they are just getting started.

Others don't have Dao-level natal talent, even if they can practice Dao Technique, it is difficult to cultivate it to the Xiaocheng realm, unlike Ye Tian who has Dao-level natal talent, and he can easily cultivate a Dao Technique to perfection, even the extreme realm.

But the strength of these three True Ancestors is not weak in itself, even if it is an entry-level Dao technique, its power is also very strong.

"Three top true ancestors!"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

He never expected that there would be three top True Ancestors to attack him, and the Void Heaven Hall was now only three top True Ancestors!

This battle is too luxurious!

"It's definitely not the power of the Dao Mountain Realm, no force can easily send three top True Ancestors, and no force of the Dao Mountain Realm is willing to make a feud with the Void Heaven lineage. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He guessed that these three True Ancestors should be domain realm forces, that is, forces from the Divine Heaven Realm.

But he didn't have any hatred with those forces, and the other party actually sent three top True Ancestors to assassinate him, the newly promoted True Ancestor.

Suddenly, he remembered that the True Ancestor of the Void Heaven Temple had been assassinated recently.

Obviously, it was these three True Ancestors who did it!

The copying talent enveloped the audience, and Ye Tian knew the origin of these three true ancestors.

"Liuli Sect!"

In the introduction of the copy talent display, it is revealed that these three true ancestors are from the Liuli Sect, a five-heaven force.

"You're looking for death!"

Ye Tian was extremely angry.

The true ancestor of the Liuli Sect dared to assassinate the true ancestor of their Void Heaven Temple, and this time the disappearance of the geniuses and strong men of the human race must have been done by the Liuli Sect, just to lure him out.

Before, Ye Tian was still wondering who would capture the geniuses and strong men of the human race, but not kill them, wouldn't this be an extra move.

Now, he understands!

It is false to capture the geniuses and strong men of the human race, and it is true to lead him out of the country of virtual innocence.

Ye Tian knew very well that if he was defeated, those geniuses and powerhouses of the human race would inevitably be killed.

Therefore, as long as you kill the three top True Ancestors in front of you, you will be able to rescue those geniuses and powerhouses of the human race.

If these three True Ancestors in front of him were top True Ancestors like the Dragon Power Peak Lord, Ye Tian estimated that he could only barely compete with them, and he would not be able to defeat them.

Judging from the aura, these three top true ancestors are only the weaker of the top true ancestors.

"Dao Technique-Purple Gold True Body!"

A purple-gold body appeared on Ye Tian's body, which was a defensive Dao technique.

I saw that the Dao Technique attacks of the three top True Ancestors bombarded Ye Tian's defensive Dao Technique, but they did not break Ye Tian's defense.

Immediately, Ye Tian performed the Dao Technique-the Imperial Seal of the Emperor of the Middle Heaven!

Bang!!!!

A boxy Great Seal full of endless mysteries suppressed the Quartet Void and locked almost all the escape directions of the three top True Ancestors.

Then, Ye Tian used the Blue Absolute Ice, an ice system dao technique with a wide coverage.

In a flash.

This territory was directly frozen in ice, and although the three top True Ancestors broke the Blue Shadow Absolute Ice Technique, they were injured.

You can't escape, you can only fight with Ye Tian.

Ye Tian's first door technique bombarded the three top true ancestors, but these three top true ancestors couldn't hurt Ye Tian.

At the same time, Ye Tian also performed a time dao technique - instant!

This Dao technique directly affected the time in this area, and the two sides fought for a long time, but the outside world seemed to be instantaneous.

One year!

Decade!

Ye Tian has been fighting with the three top true ancestors, but although the three top true ancestors of the Liuli Sect are not as good as Ye Tian, their ability to save their lives is not bad.

At the level of the top True Ancestor, unless the difference in strength is too great, it is not easy to kill the other party.

This battle lasted for decades, and the three top true ancestors finally couldn't support it.

"Why is he so strong??"

The three top True Ancestors of the Liuli Sect couldn't believe it.

In their opinion, this time it was just an attack on a true ancestor who had just been promoted, even if Ye Tian had the records of the three major Xuan Xuan Ancient Realms, he was not an ordinary true ancestor.

No matter how powerful and demonic the new True Ancestor is, can he be the opponent of their three top True Ancestors?

Now, at last, they know.

They are really not Ye Tian's opponents!

They had never seen such a terrifying new True Ancestor, one person knew multiple Dao techniques, and almost all of them were extreme level Dao techniques.

Moreover, a mere new True Ancestor had actually mastered the power of the Dark Taboon, and this power of the Dark Forbidden had a lot of damage to them, and it could also weaken their attack damage.

How could such a demon exist!

But in fact, such demons really exist, and they have encountered them!

Collapse!

The body of a top True Ancestor of the Liuli Sect was completely shattered and could no longer heal.

The first top true ancestor has fallen!

One top true ancestor was missing, and the other two top true ancestors went crazy and started a suicide attack, but Ye Tian's number of Dao skills and life-saving ability were far beyond their imagination.

In the end, these two top True Ancestors were also killed one by one.

With the fall of the three top True Ancestors, Ye Tian also breathed a sigh of relief.

"The consumption is too great, the power of the True Ancestor is consumed by eighty, and the power of the Dark Forbidden is almost exhausted, although I am not injured, but I want to kill a top True Ancestor, it is not easy!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He also knew his flaws, the power of the True Ancestor was too little, after all, he was only in the early stage of the Great Dao realm, and compared to those True Ancestors in the late stage of the Great Dao and even at the peak of the Great Dao, his True Ancestor power did not occupy an advantage at all.

It's just that the power of his True Ancestor is too strong, and a trace is more powerful than dozens of others!

Of course, compared to his peers, his True Ancestor power was simply too much!

After killing the three top true ancestors, Ye Tian also had a general understanding of his strength, which was stronger than the average top true ancestor and comparable to the top true ancestors.

But in terms of long-lasting combat capability, he is relatively weak.

Generally speaking, Ye Tian was not afraid of any top-notch True Ancestor, as long as he did not encounter the Supreme True Ancestor, he would not be in danger.

Moreover, he had already created a ninth-level true technique, and with his cultivation speed, he had progressed very quickly.

In addition, his forbidden body is also making rapid progress, and once it is tempered to the level of one percent, the forbidden body can be regarded as an entry.

When the time comes, his strength will skyrocket!

Therefore, it won't be long before he is not afraid of the so-called Supreme True Ancestor!

Revoking the Instant Time Dao Technique, Ye Tian released Yao Yu from the inner universe.

"Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, what happened just now?"

Yao Yu exclaimed.

"The three top true ancestors are coming, they were killed by me, let's go, let's go save people!" Ye Tian didn't want to talk nonsense, and quickly shuttled with Yao Yu.

Under Yao Yu's instructions, he soon came to a star.

The geniuses and powerhouses of the human race were all imprisoned here, and those who remained here were a few ordinary true ancestors, who were instantly wiped out by Ye Tian.

Subsequently, all the geniuses and powerhouses of the human race were rescued.

---------------

Liulizong.

When Xuangang True Ancestor learned of the fall of the three top True Ancestors, he was immediately furious.

"How can this be, the three top true ancestors, even if the three top true ancestors of the Void Heaven Temple make a move, even if they are defeated, they will not fall!"

Xuangang True Ancestor said regretfully.

Ordinary True Ancestors, the Liuli Sect doesn't care, but the top True Ancestor is different, that's the backbone of the Liuli Sect!

He is also a top True Ancestor, and the position of the three top True Ancestors in the Liuli Sect is just a little lower than him.

Now, the three top True Ancestors have fallen, and the Xuanling True Ancestor is afraid that he will reprimand him.

But he still immediately went to report to the Xuanling True Ancestor!

When the Xuanling True Ancestor learned about it, he was immediately angry, but he didn't have the impulse.

Their Liuli Sect is just a five-heaven force, if the impulsive cause the Liuli Sect Mountain Gate to be forced, then their sin will be great.

"Check carefully, you must find out, how did those three top true ancestors fall?"

Xuan Ling True Ancestor ordered.

On the other side, Ye Tian also found the Moon Shooting True Ancestor of the Void Heaven Hall and informed the Moon Shooting True Ancestor of the matter!
